themes.name: surface code dominance
themes.description: Surface codes are the de facto industrial QEC modality
supporting_facts: Surface codes remain the dominant modality
logical qubit counts crossed 1000 in late 2025

themes.name: threshold achievement
themes.description: Multiple platforms have demonstrated below-threshold operation
supporting_facts: Google demonstrated below-threshold operation on a 72-qubit Sycamore-class device
IBM Heron R3 announced 156-qubit error-corrected operation with real-time decoding

themes.name: overhead reduction
themes.description: Physical-to-logical ratio target has dropped 10x from earlier estimates
supporting_facts: fault-tolerant quantum computing will require approximately 1 million physical qubits per logical qubit, down from earlier estimates of 10 million

gaps.description: Long-term stability of logical qubits (>1 week coherence)
Bosonic codes and color codes mentioned as future but no concrete progress
gaps.what_would_fill_it: Research papers / product announcements on bosonic + color codes in 2026

contradictions.claim_a: Academic literature claims overhead reduction through better decoding algorithms
contradictions.claim_b: Industrial practice still uses 1000:1 physical-to-logical ratio
contradictions.explanation: Decoding overhead and syndrome measurement costs may offset theoretical savings
